summary: Historical failure bench for bagakit-codex-webpage-design. Cases preserve user-observed failures that should be blocked by the skill protocol or references.

cases.failure: The agent implements from text requirements without first creating or accepting a design reference.
expected_blockers: Do not start implementation with no design reference
Image2 design generation is mandatory before coding
must_find: Do not start implementation with no design reference
Image2 design generation is mandatory before coding

cases.failure: Image generation for later states follows the flawed implementation screenshot instead of the original design authority.
expected_blockers: failed or under-review implementation screenshot must not become
Do not use screenshots of a failed or under-review implementation
Reject state boards that copy visual drift
must_find: failed or under-review implementation screenshot must not become
Do not use screenshots of a failed or under-review implementation
Reject state boards that copy visual drift

cases.failure: A page presents first-viewport controls as live while only a small happy path is implemented.
expected_blockers: every visible live-looking affordance is classified
must_find: every visible live-looking affordance is classified

cases.failure: The implementation inventories only its own visible controls while missing controls, states, and details that are visible in the design reference.
A complex product screen is visually polished, but object types, navigation hierarchy, region responsibilities, and progressive disclosure are not modeled before implementation.
A product MVP looks polished, but labels, counts, status, grouping, and next-action cues do not tell the user what object or path matters next.
A drag test proves final position after mouseup but misses mid-drag flicker, redraw, z-order jumps, or scene rebuilds.
expected_blockers: before, mid-drag, and after-drag motion-frame evidence
final-position assertion after mouseup is not enough
must_find: before, mid-drag, and after-drag motion-frame evidence
final-position assertion after mouseup is not enough

cases.failure: Build, lint, Playwright, console, and overflow checks pass while screenshots still show visible blockers.
expected_blockers: Automation is execution evidence, not visual parity proof
Do not treat automated validation as a substitute for visual review
must_find: Automation is execution evidence, not visual parity proof
Do not treat automated validation as a substitute for visual review

cases.failure: The output is visually clean but lacks the product-specific delight and ambition expected for a high-craft request.
The same Relations/Questions/Evidence mode controls appear in multiple regions with unclear scope, and the business flow is not understandable from the UI.
expected_blockers: duplicated or conflicting mode controls that make the business flow unclear
must_find: duplicated or conflicting mode controls that make the business flow unclear

cases.failure: A simple single-page prototype is treated as proof that the skill can produce a sellable, eye-opening product MVP.
expected_blockers: single static page can be a smoke test
must not be used as proof
must_find: single static page can be a smoke test
must not be used as proof
